title: BTA Texture Pack Utils
description: A Mod for Better Than Adventure that allows for even more customization with Texture Packs
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!
For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page._

**Features:**

Customizable biome colors for every season
![Biome Color Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd150608f9b06fbaf65357b2be56f2dd0bf05c7.jpeg)

Customizable sky and fog colors for every season and biome
![Sky Color Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c1438209bc39b33c1187cc8efd8139c2b9c184.jpeg)

Better Foliage
![Better Foliage Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e75ba24ffdd350f136038d2105ba673553a87b84.jpeg)

Compatible with Babric and ASMLoader
